summary: Completed comprehensive testing of dashboard with metrics, charts, and interactive features. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend dashboard loads and displays data properly.
passed_tests: Dashboard Metrics API - returns total leads, conversion rate, leads by status/source, agent performance
Dashboard Metrics with Date Filter - date filtering works correctly
Leads Over Time API - returns data for day/week/month intervals
Messages Over Time API - returns inbound/outbound message data with correct structure
Response Times API - returns average, min, max, distribution buckets
All 4 KPI cards display correctly (Total Leads, Conversion Rate, Avg Response Time, Total Messages)
Time filter buttons present and functional (Today, This Week, This Month, Custom)
Custom date range picker opens calendar component
Charts display properly: Leads Over Time (line), Messages Over Time (bar), Leads by Status (pie), Leads by Source (bar), Response Time Distribution (bar)
Agent Performance table displays with correct headers and data
No loading spinners stuck in loading state
No error messages displayed on dashboard

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - Dashboard loads, displays data, interactive features work
